playlist_strategy: A progressive cyberpunk journey starting with dark synthwave warm-ups, building into high-BPM midtempo bass and industrial techno for peak lifting, and finishing with atmospheric ambient cyberpunk for the cooldown. Designed to make the listener feel like a neon-lit futuristic mercenary preparing for battle.

tracks.title: Neon Awakening
tracks.youtube_title: Neon Awakening ⚡ Ultimate Cyberpunk Gym Music | Dark Synthwave Warmup
tracks.style_prompt: Dark synthwave instrumental, 105 BPM, C Minor, pulsing analog bass, retro drum machine groove, atmospheric cyberpunk pads, slow building arpeggiator, cinematic rise intro hook within the first 5 seconds, hi-fi modern production quality.
tracks.image_prompt: Cinematic 35mm photography, medium close-up of a muscular cyborg athlete stretching in a dark, rain-slicked futuristic alleyway illuminated by neon pink and cyan signs, focused intense expression, strong contrast, shallow depth of field, YouTube dark mode optimized.
tracks.youtube_description: Start your workout right with this dark synthwave warmup track. ⚡ Feel the neon energy pulse through your veins as you prepare for the ultimate cyberpunk gym session. Perfect for stretching and getting in the zone! 🦾🔥 #synthwave #cyberpunk #gymmusic

tracks.title: Chrome Tendons
tracks.youtube_title: Chrome Tendons 🦾 Cyberpunk Workout Music | Steady Pacing Synth
tracks.style_prompt: Cyberpunk outrun instrumental, 110 BPM, G Minor, driving synth bass groove intro within first 5 seconds, punchy retro toms, gritty sawtooth lead melodies, subtle robotic vocoder textures in the background, hi-fi modern production quality.
tracks.image_prompt: Cinematic 35mm photography, close-up of a determined female runner with glowing mechanical cyberware on her arms, deep purple and electric blue lighting, high tech treadmill environment, strong contrast, shallow depth of field, expressive emotion.
tracks.youtube_description: Lock in your pace with 'Chrome Tendons'. 🦾 This driving cyberpunk outrun beat is designed for steady cardio and light lifting. Keep the rhythm locked and let the futuristic synths power your endurance run! 🏃‍♀️💨 #cyberpunkmusic #cardio #retrowave

tracks.title: System Override
tracks.youtube_title: System Override ⚠️ Cyberpunk Gym Motivation | Midtempo Bass Drop
tracks.style_prompt: Heavy midtempo bass instrumental, 100 BPM, F Minor, punchy heavy drum intro hook within 5 seconds, distorted 808 sub bass, aggressive glitchy synth textures, industrial snare, cyberpunk siren effects, explosive drop structure, hi-fi modern production.
tracks.image_prompt: Cinematic 35mm photography, medium close-up of an aggressive male powerlifter in a grimy futuristic underground gym, hazard orange and toxic green neon lighting, chalk on hands, screaming in exertion, cinematic contrast, shallow depth of field.
tracks.youtube_description: Time to override your limits! ⚠️ Heavy midtempo bass drops and gritty glitch synths to push your focused lifting sessions to the absolute max. Let the industrial cyberpunk energy fuel your next personal record! 🏋️‍♂️💀 #midtempobass #lifting #cyberpunk

tracks.title: Night City Hustle
tracks.youtube_title: Night City Hustle 🌃 High Energy Cyberpunk Workout | Electro House
tracks.style_prompt: Cyberpunk electro house instrumental, 128 BPM, A Minor, catchy acid synth 303 riff intro hook instantly within first 5 seconds, driving four-on-the-floor kick drum, metallic biting hi-hats, massive synthetic brass hits, high energy build-ups, hi-fi modern.
tracks.image_prompt: Cinematic 35mm photography, close-up of an athletic female boxer throwing a punch in a neon-drenched futuristic fighting ring, confident energetic expression, neon purple and yellow ambient lighting, cinematic shadows, YouTube dark mode optimized.
tracks.youtube_description: Keep the heart rate high with the Night City Hustle! 🌃 Pounding 128 BPM electro house infused with raw cyberpunk acid synths. Perfect for intense circuit training, boxing, and high-energy workouts. Never stop moving! 🥊⚡ #electrohouse #gymmotivation #cyberpunk

tracks.title: Neural Link Overdrive
tracks.youtube_title: Neural Link Overdrive 🧠 Hardcore Cyberpunk HIIT Music | Industrial
tracks.style_prompt: Hard industrial techno instrumental, 135 BPM, D Minor, relentless distorted kick drum intro hook immediately, harsh metallic percussion, dark droning bassline, aggressive white noise tension sweeps, sustained high intensity, hi-fi underground warehouse production quality.
tracks.image_prompt: Cinematic 35mm photography, medium close-up of a heavily tattooed male athlete doing battle ropes in a dark industrial warehouse, frenzied intense emotion, sweat flying, illuminated strictly by blood red neon and stark black shadows, shallow depth of field.
tracks.youtube_description: Push past the pain barrier with Neural Link Overdrive. 🧠 Hard, relentless industrial techno for your most brutal HIIT and heavy lifting sessions. Pure aggressive energy, zero compromises. Connect to the machine! ⛓️🔥 #industrialtechno #hiit #hardcoreworkout

tracks.title: Mecha Godzilla Lift
tracks.youtube_title: Mecha Godzilla Lift 🦖 GOD TIER Heavy Lifting Music | Cyber-Dubstep
tracks.style_prompt: Cyber tearout dubstep instrumental, 140 BPM, E Minor, dramatic cinematic rise intro building tension instantly for 5 seconds, explosive massive drops, robotic machine gun bass design, bone-rattling sub, choppy aggressive snares, epic orchestral brass stabs, hi-fi modern.
tracks.image_prompt: Cinematic 35mm photography, close-up of a massive male bodybuilder deadlifting an impossibly heavy glowing barbell, face contorted in unstoppable rage, blinding white rim light and deep crimson background, epic cybernetic aesthetic, shallow depth.
tracks.youtube_description: The ultimate PR track has arrived! 🦖 'Mecha Godzilla Lift' delivers god-tier cyber-dubstep drops designed entirely for maxing out your deadlifts and squats. Transform into a machine and move the weight! 💪💥 #heavylifting #tearout #cyberdubstep

tracks.title: Neon Blood Rush
tracks.youtube_title: Neon Blood Rush 🩸 Insane Cyberpunk Phonk | Dark Gym Motivation
tracks.target_audience: hardcore lifters and gym culture fans
tracks.style_prompt: Aggressive cyber phonk instrumental, 120 BPM, C# Minor, driving distorted 808 bass and signature cowbell melody combo intro within first 5 seconds, dark atmospheric textures, heavy phonk brass samples, subtle chopped lo-fi vocal chants, incredibly punchy mix.
tracks.image_prompt: Cinematic 35mm photography, medium close-up of a shredded female athlete doing pull-ups with a smirking confident expression, glowing neon red and midnight blue moody lighting, futuristic aesthetics, dark gym vibe, strong contrast, 8k resolution.
tracks.youtube_description: Dark, distorted, and dangerously catchy. 🩸 Neon Blood Rush brings the underground Cyber Phonk energy to your gym session. Perfect for focused reps, intense pump, and main character energy in the squat rack. 😈🔥 #cyberphonk #gymphonk #workout

tracks.title: Bionic Runner
tracks.youtube_title: Bionic Runner 🏃‍♂️ High Speed Cyberpunk Drum & Bass | Cardio Fire
tracks.thumbnail_color_palette: speeding streaks of cyan and yellow
tracks.style_prompt: High speed neurofunk drum and bass instrumental, 174 BPM, F# Minor, rapid punchy breakbeat intro hook immediately on play, morphing reece basslines, tight syncopated futuristic synths, complex rapid hi-hats, relentless forward momentum, modern hi-fi production.
tracks.image_prompt: Cinematic 35mm photography, side profile of an athletic cyborg runner sprinting through a highly futuristic city tunnel, speeding motion blur streaks of cyan and yellow lights, zen-like state of focus, extreme dynamic motion.
tracks.youtube_description: Push your cardio to the absolute limit with 'Bionic Runner'. 🏃‍♂️ At 174 BPM, this blazing fast Neurofunk Drum & Bass track is pure fuel for your longest runs and fastest sprints. The machine never stops! ⚡💨 #drumandbass #cardioworkout #cyberpunk

tracks.title: Holographic Recovery
tracks.youtube_title: Holographic Recovery 🧊 Cyberpunk Cooldown Music | Ambient Chillwave
tracks.style_prompt: Ambient chillwave instrumental, 90 BPM, Bb Major, lush warm analog pad intro within 5 seconds, relaxed lo-fi drum break, shimmering holographic chime melodies, gentle sub bass, soothing futuristic atmosphere, ultra wide stereo spread, hi-fi mix.
tracks.image_prompt: Cinematic 35mm photography, medium shot of a tired but glowing female athlete sitting on a gym bench wiping sweat, peaceful relief expression, illuminated by soft healing teal and holographic pink light from a futuristic display screen, cinematic soft focus.
tracks.youtube_description: You survived the intense session. Now it's time to heal. 🧊 Holographic Recovery provides lush, ambient chillwave grooves perfect for slow stretching, breathing exercises, and letting your heart rate drop. 🧘‍♀️✨ #chillwave #cooldown #cyberpunkchill

tracks.title: End of Line
tracks.youtube_title: End of Line 🔋 Ultimate Cyberpunk Gym Cooldown | Cinematic Synth
tracks.thumbnail_color_palette: deep space black and sunrise gold
tracks.style_prompt: Slow cinematic synth instrumental, 85 BPM, A Major, massive sweeping Vangelis-style brass intro swelling in first 5 seconds, deep rumbling drone, slow heartbeat-like kick drum, ethereal synthetic choir, deeply emotional and triumphant, massive reverb, hi-fi.
tracks.image_prompt: Cinematic 35mm photography, wide shot of a lone athlete walking out of a massive futuristic mega-gym into a stunning bright golden sunrise, deep space black shadows behind them, triumphant calm expression, highly dramatic cinematic lighting, YouTube dark mode.
tracks.youtube_description: The mission is complete. Stand tall. 🔋 'End of Line' provides a gorgeous, cinematic, Blade Runner-esque soundscape for your final deep stretches and glorious gym exit. Rest up and prepare for tomorrow. 🌅🏆 #cinematicsynth #workoutcooldown #epicmusic
